display.purpose: The one active hero sentence only (search state).

body.purpose: All functional UI: cards, modals, forms, buttons.

shadows.name: paper-rest
shadows.purpose: Default resting shadow for cozy cards/sheets.

shadows.name: modal-panel-strong
shadows.purpose: BookModal panel shadow, deepest in the system.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default calm transitions across hover/focus states; no bounce or elastic easing used in this system.

components.name: Book Card
components.description: Grid item showing a book's cover with animated hover lift; the primary browsing unit on the dashboard.
components.css: .ds-book-card { background: #FFFDFB; border-radius: 0px; padding: 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .ds-book-cover-wrap { width: 180px; height: 252px; box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(17,22,37,0.06); transition: box-shadow 0.3s ease, transform 0.3s ease; } .ds-book-cover-wrap:hover { box-shadow: 0 20px 30px rgba(17,22,37,0.18); transform: scale(1.04); } .ds-book-cover { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; }

components.name: Book Detail Modal
components.description: Overlay dialog showing full book details (cover, title, author, tags, shelf location) with edit/delete actions.
components.css: .ds-modal-overlay { background: rgba(17,22,37,0.25); position: fixed; inset: 0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .ds-modal-panel { background: #F4F2E4; border-radius: 0px; padding: 40px 36px 36px 36px; box-shadow: 0 12px 35px rgba(17,22,37,0.15); } .ds-tag-pill { background: #EAE7D8; border-radius: 20px; padding: 4px 12px; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; }

components.name: Add Location Modal
components.description: Overlay dialog for selecting/creating a room, bookshelf, and shelf index for a book.
components.html: Living Room → Shelf B
components.css: .ds-modal-overlay { background: rgba(17,22,37,0.25); position: fixed; inset: 0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .ds-add-location.ds-modal-panel { background: #F4F2E4; border-radius: 0px; padding: 28px 24px 24px 24px; box-shadow: 0 12px 30px rgba(17,22,37,0.12); } .ds-highlight { background: #F7EAE6; padding: 10px 14px; border-radius: 0px; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', sans-serif; }

components.name: Search Input (hero)
components.description: The signature search interaction: an inline serif input with a soft ink-blue-tinted pill background and a wavy underline focus cue.
components.css: .ds-search-pill { font-family: 'Newsreader', Georgia, serif; font-style: italic; font-size: 32px; color: #002CBC; background: rgba(0,44,188,0.06); border-radius: 8px; padding: 6px 20px; text-decoration: underline wavy #002CBC; text-decoration-thickness: 1.5px; } .ds-press-enter { font-family: 'Instrument Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: bold; color: #868C9B; opacity: 0.8; margin-left: 12px; }

narrative.overview:
This is a household inventory, not a SaaS product, and it should never look or feel like one. The system reads as a personal reading nook: warm paper backgrounds, ink-blue underlines standing in for handwriting, and soft diffuse "paper" shadows instead of hard elevation. Density is low and unhurried.

The palette stays close to the page: paper and sheet-white behave like paper and card stock, ink-primary reads as ink rather than corporate near-black, and ink-blue is used sparingly as a wavy underline / accent, the way a fountain-pen doodle would mark up a page.
keyCharacteristics: Paper-and-ink palette: warm cream body, ink-blue accent used only as underline/emphasis
Soft, diffuse, low-opacity ink-tinted shadows standing in for lifted paper
One serif display font for hero moments, one sans for everything functional

rules.name: The One Ink Rule
rules.body: accent-primary (#002CBC) is the only saturated color allowed to read as active state. It appears only as an underline or a low-opacity wash, never as a filled surface.

rules.name: The Ink-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Every shadow in the system is rgba(17,22,37, a) — the same ink color as body text, just translucent.

rules.name: The One Serif Rule
rules.body: Newsreader appears in exactly one place at a time: the active hero sentence. It is never used for card titles, modal headings, or buttons.

rules.name: The Ink-Tint-Only Rule
rules.body: No shadow in this system uses a color other than rgba(17,22,37, ...). Depth comes from opacity and blur radius, not color shift.

dos: Do keep every shadow tinted rgba(17,22,37, a) — ink, not gray or black.
Do treat accent-primary (#002CBC) as a rare accent (underline, thin wash) — never a filled surface.
Do keep card and modal corners flat (0px); save organic/pill radii for the FAB and tag pills only.
Do use Newsreader only for the one active hero sentence; everything else is Instrument Sans.
Do keep transitions soft and unhurried, matching a calm, ambient personal tool.
donts: Don't introduce cold gray SaaS-dashboard chrome, harsh box-shadows, or sterile tech surfaces.

Don't use gradient text, cream-on-cream low-contrast body copy, generic identical icon+heading+text card grids, sketchy/doodle SVG illustrations, side-stripe colored borders, or decorative glassmorphism.
Don't fill large surfaces with accent-primary; it must stay a thin accent, not a background.
Don't add a second display serif or a second accent color "for variety".
Don't darken shadow opacity above ~0.15 even on the modal panel.
